theme: vampire docks at night, thick fog, weathered timber, iron lanterns, rusted anchors, salt-bleached crates

post_mooring_dock.usage: mooring post repeated along dock edge backline

lamp_fog_iron.usage: fog lamp on tall post, dim amber glow accent between posts

anchor_rusted_large.usage: large anchor floor prop near posts

crate_stack_dock.usage: cargo crate stack mid-stage clutter prop
